title: Founder's Associate (Ops)
key_evidence: ROLE STATUS: Listed as CLOSED on assuric.com/careers (all four roles — Founder's Associate Ops, Clinical Associate, AI Founding Engineer, Fullstack Engineer — show Closed). No live per-role apply URL found; only a LinkedIn historical posting (4004339031) exists.

Domain = healthtech / medical-device & software regulatory compliance automation (NHS Innovation Accelerator, Entrepreneurs First backed, founded 2024). This is explicitly outside Ryan's crypto/Web3 + AI-tooling domain per CV constraints (NOT healthtech) — a core spike/domain mismatch.

Role content ('build AI and automation workflows, streamline processes, help shape us as we scale') maps reasonably to Ryan's Claude Code automation + first-employee operator profile — the one positive, but generic and detail-light.
Founders ex-Palantir CTO + clinical CEO; small EF-backed team => founder-read screening if reopened (positive), discoverable founders on LinkedIn (warm-path moderate).
No salary/equity disclosed; healthtech regulatory ramp is steep for a non-domain operator => weak conversion.
biggest_lever: If the role reopens, lead with first-employee operator + Claude Code automation framing; warm-path via founders' LinkedIn (Dr Paul Jewell / Matt Jennings) since there is no live ATS.
biggest_risk: Role is currently closed (not applyable) AND the domain is regulated healthtech compliance — outside Ryan's expertise and one of the steepest ramps of the batch. Lowest actionability.
